title: A U.K. prime minister takes charge with a promise to dilute power
summary_full: Andy Burnham, until recently the mayor of Greater Manchester, has replaced Keir Starmer as head of the Labour Party. Burnham becomes prime minister on Monday.
summary_public: Andy Burnham, until recently the mayor of Greater Manchester, has replaced Keir Starmer as head of the Labour Party. Burnham becomes prime minister on Monday.

GB.label: neutral
